key_points: Housing chaos is a decade-long pattern, not a new problem
Students assigned without rooms, some report mold and no utilities
Juniors/seniors pushed off-campus with little notice mid-enrollment
key_quotes: This has been the same thing for the last 10 years… but parents still keep sending their children
Now they are there with no water. Molded showers and no electricity.
They demand she and all juniors and seniors move off-campus with very little advance notice!

key_points: Greek life dominates campus culture; non-D9 students can feel excluded
Homecoming is a major cultural event but attracts off-campus safety risks
Atlanta location adds significant social opportunities beyond campus
key_quotes: At least 4 shot at Clark Atlanta University homecoming party
Welcome to the panther family🐾 Have the best experience & don't let them stress you out lol
I love your vids on youtube and even tiktok, such an inspiring person in general

key_points: No meaningful student feedback on dining quality found in data
Off-campus Atlanta food scene frequently referenced as alternative
No specific on-campus dining complaints or praise surfaced
key_quotes: The food/college tour was awesome
People forget this great store called Walmart... you could have gotten all that wayyy cheaper

key_points: Administrative stress cited repeatedly as a major student burden
Financial aid chaos and housing uncertainty create real anxiety
No visible mental health support resources mentioned by students
key_quotes: This school has caused so much frustration for my daughter!
Have the best experience & don't let them stress you out lol
I'm a transfer student and rushing to get everything straight for the fall

key_points: Financial aid office is disorganized and slow to respond
Students threatened with collections and blocked from senior enrollment over billing
Scholarship offers sent but payment deadlines poorly communicated
key_quotes: If she does not pay $2800 before May 15th, they will send her to collections and refuse to allow her to enroll in her Senior classes!
I would NEVER RECOMMEND Clark-Atlanta
IMPORTANT - Clark Atlanta Scholarship Offer + Fee Payment [post with no follow-up information]

key_points: Pre-med and academic program quality is unclear from student accounts
No standout academic praise or complaints in available data
CAU mentioned alongside AUC consortium schools suggesting some shared resources
key_quotes: I wanted to know if they had a good pre med program... All I know is that they have a pre med program but I don't know if it's worth applying for
Clark Atlanta University, Morehouse College, Morris Brown College, and Spelman College [share AUC resources]

key_points: Administration described as 'janky' going back to the late 1980s
Students must find personal contacts inside admin to get anything done
Financial and housing admin failures are well-documented and ongoing
key_quotes: Clark Atlanta University has been janky for a long time, all the way back to the late 80's
My advice would be to find someone in admin so you plugged in — I would recommend Ms. Jordan (that's who answers when you call the school)
I definitely think the unorganized trait is for like every HBCU 😂 But I know I'm getting on my financial aid advisor nerves

key_points: Campus exterior receives consistent praise in tour videos
Surrounding neighborhood safety is a real concern for students
AUC shuttle to downtown Atlanta apartments exists but is limited
key_quotes: Is it safe to walk around and all that? Are the surrounding areas really as bad as people say??
The outside looks great, thanks for the outside tour
5 minute walk from GSU downtown campus & they have a shuttle that runs every 20 minutes for AUC students

AUC consortium membership potentially expands networking opportunities

Students love Atlanta and the AUC experience but battle the bureaucracy
Incoming students are enthusiastic; returning students are often frustrated

key_points: **Housing**: mold, no water, no electricity reported in dorms
**Administration**: students blocked from graduation over disputed billing sent to collections
**Safety**: shooting at homecoming party; dorm burglaries with inadequate response
key_quotes: Now they are there with no water. Molded showers and no electricity.
They will send her to collections and refuse to allow her to enroll in her Senior classes!
At least 4 shot at Clark Atlanta University homecoming party

key_points: AUC consortium gives access to Morehouse and Spelman resources and social life
Atlanta itself is a major asset for networking, internships, and culture
Personal admin contacts like 'Ms. Jordan' can unlock smoother navigation
key_quotes: My advice would be to find someone in admin so you plugged in — I would recommend Ms. Jordan
5 minute walk from GSU downtown campus & they have a shuttle that runs every 20 minutes for AUC students
